decks.notes: The main concept of this UWx Control deck is to control the opponent's plays through counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive cards like Stifle and Wasteland. The deck aims to establish board control by using powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo and Teferi, while also having access to card draw and filtering with cards like Brainstorm and Ponder. With a mix of permission spells, removal, and card advantage, the deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent until it can establish a winning position.

The main focus of this UWx Control deck is to establish control of the board through counterspells, removal, and card advantage. The deck utilizes powerful cards such as Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining efficient removal with card draw from Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and slow down their strategy. The inclusion of cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Teferi, Time Raveler provide additional ways to control the game and protect the player's own board presence.

This deck revolves around using Mystic Forge to dig through your library and cast artifacts for free. By using cards such as Manifold Key and Voltaic Key to untap artifacts like Grim Monolith and Glaring Fleshraker, you can generate infinite mana and draw your entire deck. Karn, the Great Creator can shut down your opponent's artifacts, while cards like Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and The One Ring provide additional utility and win conditions. Planar Nexus can be used to take extra turns, giving you the time to assemble your combo and overwhelm your opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, then using spells like Reanimate, Shallow Grave, and Animate Dead to bring them back into play. The deck also includes disruption cards like Collective Brutality, Unmask, and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's hand and protect your combo. The mana acceleration provided by cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal allows for explosive plays, while Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Cabal Therapy provide additional utility and disruption. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and win quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces of Coveted Jewel, The One Ring, and either Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Paradox Engine to generate a powerful advantage. By using cards like Transmute Artifact, Copy Artifact, and Show and Tell, the deck aims to cheat these powerful artifacts into play and overwhelm the opponent. With mana acceleration from cards like Grim Monolith and Lotus Petal, as well as disruption in the form of Force of Will and Misdirection, this deck seeks to establish control and ultimately win the game through its powerful combo pieces.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to use aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Orcish Bowmasters, combined with powerful removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Cabal Therapy, to quickly overwhelm opponents and disrupt their strategy. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provide additional support and resilience, while Wasteland and Karakas help control the board. The deck also includes some card advantage and disruption in the form of Voice of Victory and Hexing Squelcher, making it a versatile and potent aggro strategy.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay, utilizing creatures like Wight of the Reliquary, Scythecat Cub, and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes disruption elements with Thoughtseize and Wasteland to control the game and stay ahead in tempo. Green Sun's Zenith and Once Upon a Time provide deck consistency and help find key creatures when needed. The inclusion of cards like Endurance and Sylvan Safekeeper helps protect the deck's key threats while maintaining pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to be fast, efficient, and disruptive in its strategy.

This deck focuses on using artifacts and graveyard recursion to assemble a powerful combo that can generate infinite mana and win the game in a single turn. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Goblin Welder to recur key artifacts like Urza's Bauble and Mox Opal, the deck can quickly ramp into a game-winning play. Urza's Saga serves as a powerful tutor to find the pieces needed to assemble the combo, while cards like Melded Moxite and Legion Extruder provide additional utility and support to keep the engine running smoothly.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting opponents with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push while maintaining board control with creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters. Utilizing cards like Brainstorm and Mishra's Bauble to dig for key pieces and protect the board with countermagic like Force of Will and Daze. The deck aims to apply pressure early and efficiently while controlling the game tempo, ultimately overwhelming opponents with a mix of disruption and aggression.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's actions through counterspells and removal spells, while also utilizing card draw and manipulation to maintain card advantage. It includes a mix of powerful planeswalkers, creatures, and powerful control spells to outvalue opponents and disrupt their game plan. The deck aims to control the board and dictate the pace of the game until it can establish a dominant position and close out the game.
In addition, the deck includes a variety of versatile answers to different threats, allowing it to adapt to a wide range of matchups.

This deck focuses on using lands as a resource to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing cards like Crop Rotation, Exploration, and Life from the Loam, the player can search for key lands, play extra lands each turn, and recur lands from the graveyard. The deck also includes disruption cards like Sphere of Resistance and Malevolent Rumble to slow down the opponent's game plan. The win condition is to assemble the Dark Depths-Thespian's Stage combo or utilize Urza's Saga to generate powerful tokens.

This deck focuses on using the powerful combo of Show and Tell to cheat big threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play. Sneak Attack can also be used to quickly put these threats into play. The deck includes various card draw and selection tools like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Stock Up to find combo pieces. Force of Will and Veil of Summer provide protection against disruption while ramp like Lotus Petal, Ancient Tomb, and City of Traitors help accelerate the deck's game plan. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats early in the game.

The main concept of this Aluren combo deck is to quickly assemble the Aluren enchantment, allowing you to cast creatures with a CMC of 3 or less for free. By combining Aluren with cards like Acererak the Archlich, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and Omniscience, you can generate significant value and create powerful board states. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will to protect your combo pieces and Show and Tell to cheat them into play. Using powerful utility lands and cantrips, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on using various tutor effects, mana acceleration, and card draw to set up a powerful combo turn where the player can cast a large amount of spells in a single turn to generate lethal storm count and finish the opponent with Tendrils of Agony or other ways to win the game. The deck also utilizes Wishclaw Talisman and Urza's Saga to search for key combo pieces, while utilizing disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win quickly and efficiently through a storm combo.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Cabal Therapy while pressuring the opponent with efficient threats like Guide of Souls and Amped Raptor. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Voice of Victory to close out games quickly, making it a fast-paced and efficient aggressive strategy in the Legacy format.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy through hand disruption and efficient removal while simultaneously applying pressure with evasive creatures. By combining disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will with efficient threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and secure victory through attrition. The inclusion of cards like Brainstorm and Ponder provide card selection to ensure consistency in drawing important pieces, while Wasteland helps to further disrupt the opponent's mana base.
